general.title: 1. General Provisions
general.content: These Terms of Use govern the use of {{salonName}} services. By using our services, you agree to these terms.

booking.title: 2. Booking and Cancellation
booking.paragraph1: To book procedures, you must provide correct contact information. We reserve the right to confirm or decline a booking.
booking.cancellationText: The client can cancel the appointment no later than 24 hours before the scheduled time. If canceled less than 24 hours in advance, a penalty of 50% of the service cost may be charged.

payment.title: 3. Payment for Services
payment.paragraph1: Payment is made in cash or by card after the service is provided. Prices for services are indicated in the price list and may be changed without prior notice.
payment.paragraph2: If the client is more than 15 minutes late, the salon reserves the right to cancel the appointment or shorten the procedure time.

medical.title: 4. Medical Contraindications
medical.paragraph1: The client must inform the master about any medical contraindications, allergies or health features before the procedure.
medical.paragraph2: The salon is not responsible for the consequences of procedures if the client concealed information about medical contraindications.

warranty.title: 5. Warranties and Liability
warranty.paragraph1: We guarantee the quality of materials used and the professionalism of our masters. The result of procedures may vary depending on the individual characteristics of the client.
warranty.paragraph2: In case of dissatisfaction with the result, the client must contact the salon within 7 days to discuss possible solutions.

privacy.title: 6. Confidentiality
privacy.content: We respect your privacy and undertake to protect your personal data in accordance with our <link>Privacy Policy</link>.

changes.title: 7. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to change these Terms of Use at any time. Changes take effect from the moment of publication on the site.

contact.title: 8. Contacts
contact.description: For all questions related to these Terms, you can contact us:
